data.body: Landing d9aa: main still FFO (ADR 0047 Rebase-If-Necessary not yet deployed). Main advancing under concurrent landing (f542 -> 1131b491b). Rebased d9aa to ps3 on 1131b491b, pushed; auto-land poll will submit when Verified+LLM-Review green. Filed bug a16d (brocatello-overpriced-raptors) for the load-dependent writer-storm concurrency flake (test_concurrent_writer_storm_no_loss; git tree-build/HEAD race under -n4 CI load; passes 5/5 locally). Workflow sweep on main f542: codeql/eval/optionality/verify-identity/mirror-guard/reconcile-bridge-canary GREEN; gerrit-verify green on d9aa change; test.yml red = a16d flake (re-running); external-integration red = FM-2 environmental (contents:read token can't push ref); terraform-drift red = A1 real user_data drift (operator apply).
